name: 数字踪迹 / 文本方法
description: 用数字踪迹数据、文本挖掘、NLP、机器学习测量组织与员工相关构念的方法论取向(跨主题,重方法)。

topic: digital trace data, computational social science in organizations
text mining, natural language processing of organizational text
theory: any organizational theory operationalized via text/traces
method: text classification, topic modeling, word/sentence embeddings
supervised ML, validation against human coding
data: job postings, emails, Slack/collaboration logs, earnings calls
any large-scale user-generated or digital trace corpus
setting: any organizational/work context studied via digital traces
